meta.title: Chavez's Win? Venezuela Post Election
meta.description: After nearly 14 years in power, Hugo Chávez has been re-elected President once again. What does this outcome mean for the future of Venezuela? Will there be long-reaching global ramifications as a result of the election? Hudson's Center for Latin American Studies will hold a timely and important analysis of the recent Venezuelan election, and what it means for U.S. policymakers. The discussion will feature a distinguished panel of experts on Venezuela including: Keynote Speaker: Patr
